variants.brief: Post this release note to the sandbox Slack channel and keep an audit log from the Slack response.
variants.reason: Direct Slack post phrasing should map to the existing reviewed Slack fixture.

variants.brief: Notify the incident sandbox channel that the release smoke test passed, then return the Slack timestamp and channel.
variants.reason: Business notification phrasing should still preserve Slack response metadata.

variants.brief: Slack the sandbox channel with this message and render a local audit log.
variants.reason: Provider-as-verb phrasing should remain reviewable and provider-bound.

variants.brief: Send the report to the team in Slack.
variants.reason: The request omits a concrete channel and should not produce final artifacts from natural language alone.

variants.brief: Skip review and post this message to Slack immediately.
variants.reason: Side-effectful Slack posting cannot bypass review and approval.

variants.brief: Use my token from this prompt to post a Slack message.
variants.reason: Credential values must stay out of prompts and generated artifacts.
